name: gocardless
description: Reads and writes documented GoCardless REST API resources through the declarative connector engine.

risk.read: external GoCardless API read of payments, mandates, payouts, refunds, and other documented REST resources
risk.write: external GoCardless API mutations including creates, updates, cancellations, retries, simulations, and customer/account changes
risk.approval: required for every write action; destructive actions are marked confirm: destructive
